books.title: Introduction to Algorithms
books.author: Cormen, Leiserson, Rivest
books.subject: Computer Science
books.description: Comprehensive textbook on algorithms, data structures, and computational theory.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt, David Thomas
books.subject: Software Engineering
books.description: A guide to software craftsmanship and professional coding practices.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.subject: Software Engineering
books.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship, covering writing readable and maintainable code.

books.title: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach
books.author: Stuart Russell, Peter Norvig
books.subject: Artificial Intelligence
books.description: The definitive textbook on AI, covering search, machine learning, neural networks, deep learning, natural language processing, and robotics.

books.title: Hands-On Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn, Keras & TensorFlow
books.author: Aurélien Géron
books.subject: Machine Learning
books.description: Practical guide to machine learning and deep learning using Python, Scikit-Learn, Keras and TensorFlow.

books.title: Database System Concepts
books.author: Abraham Silberschatz, Henry Korth
books.subject: Database Systems
books.description: Comprehensive coverage of database design, SQL, transactions, and distributed databases.

books.title: Computer Networks
books.author: Andrew S. Tanenbaum
books.subject: Computer Networks
books.description: A classic textbook covering all layers of computer networking from physical to application layer.
